questions.text: You are preparing for Google Associate Cloud Engineer and reviewing Setting up a cloud solution environment. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use ACE exam guide and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.
